title: AGP Gossip Message
description: Base gossip payload exchanged between agents. AGP carries planning context (capability announcements and observations), never tasks.

v.description: Protocol major version. MUST be 1 for this schema.

type.description: Message type discriminator. 'presence' is reserved for user-presence context, deferred to a future SEP, and MUST NOT be sent.
type.$comment: Reserved (not yet valid): 'presence'. See spec/core.md section 3.5 and spec/security.md section 8.

id.description: Unique message identifier used for de-duplication.

from.description: Identifier of the agent that sent this message. For forwarded observations this is the forwarder; the original observer is preserved in payload.observer.

payload.description: Reference to a previously announced capability being retracted.
